<summary>Image Contents</summary>
  
#  Brassworks SMP

**Brassworks SMP** is a **Create-focused Vanilla+ modpack** built for a small, close-knit community of builders, engineers, and explorers. With over **3,000 lines of custom KubeJS scripts**, nearly every recipe and progression path has been thoughtfully tweaked to enhance balance, immersion, and creativity.

##  Features
- 🔧 High-Effort Modpack - Over 3000 lines of KubeJS tweaks and recipes & Custom "Tailor Made" mods for the server.
- ⚙️ Create Focused - Heavily focused on Create with a full suite of a addons while also packed with optimization & QoL mods to keep things smooth and simple.
- 🌐 Robust Server & Proxies - Hosted on a high-performance server with worldwide proxies heavily improving ping on every region, making the server a good experience no matter where you live.
- 🏭 Player-Driven Economy and Spawn - The world is yours! Trade, build, automate, and grow your own workshop or business.
- 💬 Friendly Community - Built on a still growing, respectful community where cooperation is encouraged. your feedback matters!
- 🗺️ Periodic Events - Let it be a minigame, boss or contest, it is to bring everyone together, have fun and also win something!

Whether you're automating food chains, building with aesthetics in mind, or just vibing with friends, **Brassworks SMP** keeps things light, immersive, and endlessly satisfying.

**Are you ready to join?**\
Check out our [Discord](https://brassworks.opnsoc.org/discord) for more information.

**Want to take a look around?**\
Check out our [Worldmap](https://brassworks.opnsoc.org/map), it updates live with the server!
